## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss account management processes, team structure, and improvement areas for Tribe & Boost.](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to implement standardized account health tracking and reporting across all clients](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Training and templates required to improve consistency in client communication and management](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Hiring focus should be on account managers with strong content backgrounds and SEO knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Weekly 2-hour training sessions to be implemented on Fridays to align team and share knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

## Topics

### Account Health Tracking

  - [Implement classification system for all accounts in OS (Operating System)](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Track performance metrics and stakeholder satisfaction for each client](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Create triggers/automation to flag issues and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Use Notion for initial documentation, refine process later](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Pod leads to own weekly updates on account status](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Client Communication and Reporting

  - [Standardize templates for client updates in Slack and Notion](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Include key metrics like number of articles published vs. target](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Ensure blockers and action items are clearly communicated](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Improve quality of meeting notes and internal updates](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Pod leads to manage 5-8 accounts on average](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Account managers to focus on day-to-day tasks (Airtable, article generation, writer management)](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Pod leads to oversee strategy, results, and unblocking team issues](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Consider adjusting structure as company scales to maintain efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Hiring and Skill Sets

  - [Focus on hiring account managers with writing backgrounds who learned SEO](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Look for candidates with experience running their own blogs/content](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Leverage current team for referrals of qualified candidates](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)
  - [Consider renaming "Account Manager" role to avoid potential confusion](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)

### Training and Knowledge Sharing

  - [Implement mandatory 2-hour Friday morning training sessions](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Use sessions for templates review, working sessions, and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Record trainings for future reference and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Address gaps in client management skills (e.g., reading body language cues)](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Specific Account Issues

  - [Boost: Quality issues stemmed from inaccurate company brief, now being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Tribe: Struggling to justify ROI due to lack of traffic impact](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Arena: Mixed signals on account status, need clear communication on path forward](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=3057.0)

### Alternative Revenue Streams

  - [Jimmy working on email deliverability solutions for potential new offering](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
  - [Facing challenges with Gmail verification processes for account creation](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create and implement account health tracking system in OS](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Develop standardized templates for client communication and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Schedule and plan first Friday training session](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Review and adjust pod lead/account manager role definitions](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Intensify hiring efforts for account managers with desired skill sets](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Address immediate account issues (Boost, Tribe, Arena)](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Continue exploration of alternative revenue streams (email deliverability)](https://fathom.video/share/aMEPiixjqigmDEapyNQsTwppjUgZfQTh?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
